Ursa Major Global Tech

Case Study

Ursa Major Global Tech

  • Logo Design
  • Branding
  • Web Design
  • Web Development

A combined branding and website engagement designed to communicate technical credibility with a sharper and more unified digital identity.

Overview

Ursa Major Global Tech needed a brand and website system that could speak with more authority, simplify the company narrative, and create a more unified experience across touchpoints.

Goals

  • Align brand presentation and web experience into one coherent system.
  • Clarify the message for technical and business audiences alike.
  • Establish a stronger visual foundation for future growth.

Approach

The work focused on combining strategic messaging, a cleaner brand expression, and more deliberate layout choices so the site could feel both capable and approachable.

Result

The final direction gave the company a stronger visual identity and a website framework that better supports credibility, storytelling, and future expansion.

Get in Touch

Let's build a sharper website for your brand.

We help businesses clarify their message and create custom websites that look great, perform better, and drive results. Whether you need a new site, a redesign, or expert guidance, RedTail is here to help.
